name: Mixed Bean Tofu
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces (90 g) green beans, trimmed and sliced
1 shallot or 3 spring onions, finely chopped
3 ounces (90 g) canned red kidney beans, rinsed and drained
A few drops of lemon juice
2 teaspoons chopped fresh herbs: parsley, oregano, coriander, mint, etc.
Sprigs of fresh herbs for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the green beans and broad beans in a saucepan with a little lightly salted water and cook for 8 minutes, or until tender. Drain and rinse with cold water.
2. Mix the cooked beans with the shallot or spring onions, celery, red pepper, kidney beans, and tofu. Sprinkle with lemon juice and season with salt and pepper. Transfer to a serving plate.
3. In a small bowl, mix the fromage frais with chopped herbs, seasoning with a little salt and pepper. Serve with the salad and garnish with sprigs of fresh herbs.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Serves: 1
Calories: 210
